_notes.nf_vs_ng: Magic PCells use 'nf' for finger count. IHP130 SPICE netlists (xschem) use 'ng'. Both refer to the same quantity.
_notes.spice_units: IHP130 SPICE dimensions are in meters (SI). The estimator converts them to um automatically.
_notes.hbt_fixed_l: npn13g2 has a fixed emitter length (l=0.9um); only nx (emitter stripes) varies. npn13g2l/v have variable emitter length.
_notes.hbt_m_vs_nx: For HBTs, the SPICE 'm' parameter maps to 'nx' (number of emitter stripes) in Magic. Some netlists also carry a separate 'Nx' parameter.
_notes.sources: Layout rules from IHP SG13G2 Open Source PDK (IHP-GmbH/IHP-Open-PDK). Magic tech from ihp-sg13g2.tcl/ihp-sg13g2-fet.tcl/ihp-sg13g2-bjt.tcl/ihp-sg13g2-res.tcl.

sg13_lv_nmos._comment: 1.2V LV NMOS, Lmin=0.13um, Wmin=0.15um. Area=(ah*W+bh)*(aw*L*nf+bw*nf+cw). Coefficients are physically motivated placeholders.

sg13_lv_pmos._comment: 1.2V LV PMOS, Lmin=0.13um, Wmin=0.15um. Slightly taller than NMOS due to n-well overhead.

sg13_hv_nmos._comment: 3.3V HV NMOS, Lmin=0.45um, Wmin=0.15um. Larger layout due to ThickGateOx and wider design rules.

sg13_hv_pmos._comment: 3.3V HV PMOS, Lmin=0.40um (Magic lmin), Wmin=0.15um. Larger n-well requirement vs HV NMOS.

rsil._comment: Silicided poly resistor, Rsh=7 Ohm/sq, Wmin=Lmin=0.5um. Model: area=slope*L+intercept per W value.

rppd._comment: P+ unsalicided poly resistor (with protection diode), Rsh=260 Ohm/sq, Wmin=Lmin=0.5um.

rhigh._comment: N- unsalicided high-sheet poly resistor, Rsh=1360 Ohm/sq, Wmin=Lmin=0.5um.

cap_cmim._comment: MIM capacitor, Carea=1.5 fF/um2, Wmin=Lmin=2.0um, Wmax=Lmax=30.0um. Model: area=(W+2*border)*(L+2*border).

npn13g2._comment: Standard NPN HBT. Fixed emitter: w=0.07um (ge-cap emitter), l=0.9um. Only nx (emitter stripe count, up to 10) varies. In SPICE, 'm' maps to nx. Area=(fixed_h)*(aw*nx+bw).

npn13g2l._comment: NPN HBT with variable emitter length (El=l in SPICE: 1.0-2.5um) and nx (1-4). In SPICE: 'le' maps to 'l' in Magic, 'm' maps to 'nx'. Area=(ah*l+bh)*(aw*nx+bw).

npn13g2v._comment: High-power NPN HBT. Wider emitter (w=0.12um, hvnec type). Variable l (1.0-5.0um), nx (1-8). In SPICE: 'le' → 'l', 'm' → 'nx'. Area=(ah*l+bh)*(aw*nx+bw).
